title: apply_set_modifiers: sorted Vec alloc for small fixed-size modifier set
description: apply_set_modifiers allocates a Vec<&str> via modifiers.to_vec() and calls sort_unstable_by_key. The modifier set has at most 4 elements (lower/upper/length/quotewildcard/firstline). Sorting a heap-allocated Vec for a max-4-element collection is wasteful; an insertion into a small fixed-size array or a manual precedence-ordered application would avoid the alloc. This is a micro-optimization but it's on the set-command hot path.
